name: Autonomous Swarm Recon — Contested Zone
description: A small team deploys a drone swarm to perform reconnaissance over a contested area. AMOS coordinates swarm movement, distributes tasks, and adapts when assets are degraded.
audience: Special operations, defense innovation groups, robotics research teams

injects.message: SWARM DEPLOY: 8-element recon swarm launched. Spreading to reconnaissance formation.
SWARM STATUS: Formation established. Sector scan initiated — coverage 78%.

injects.description: RF emitter detected — potential C2 node

injects.message: SIGINT: RF emission detected. ELINT drone redirected for signal classification. Swarm auto-repositioning for triangulation.

injects.description: Air defense radar detected — threat to swarm
EW jamming detected — comms degradation across swarm

injects.message: WARNING: EW jamming detected. Swarm switching to frequency-hop mode. 2 drones operating in autonomous fallback.

injects.description: Extended patrol — battery drain on forward elements

injects.message: SWARM ADAPT: 2 drones RTB for battery. Formation self-healing — remaining 6 expanding coverage.
HVT DETECTED: 3-vehicle convoy. Swarm converging for persistent track. COA generated: SURVEIL + report.
MISSION COMPLETE: 3 targets identified, 1 HVT under persistent track. Intel package transmitted. Swarm RTB.
